description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two ubuntu-latest jobs: build and test. The build job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt 5.15.2, installs dependencies, sets up kColorPicker and kImageAnnotator, builds the project, and uploads the build artifacts. The test job depends on the build job, downloads the build artifacts, and runs tests.
